full_text:
Guo Tai 國泰
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Tai (國泰). Son of Guo Yuan. Given rank by Cao Cao for his father’s achievements. Guo Tai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
